feature.gateway.description.message: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (/v1/*) that routes to local runtimes (vLLM, llama.cpp, Ollama, TGI) and remote providers (OpenAI, Azure, …). Alias-based model resolution, SSE streaming with TTFT extraction, and automatic retry.

feature.security.description.message: Full RBAC with JWT authentication, OAuth / SSO / OIDC, Redis rate limiting, concurrency leasing, and Fernet-encrypted DB secrets. Presidio-based PII detection with per-tenant policies, configurable entity types, and fail-safe modes.

feature.observability.description.message: Langfuse tracing with privacy modes, Loki + Alloy centralized logging, OpenTelemetry + Jaeger distributed tracing, and a dashboard with Grafana panel embeds. Every gateway request and admin action is audit-logged.

feature.rag.description.message: Multi-tenant retrieval with vector, keyword, and hybrid search. Virtual container tree with draft/publish workflows, presigned MinIO uploads, collector plugins, and async processing via Taskiq + RabbitMQ.

feature.ops.description.message: Full container lifecycle management, image pulls with SSE progress, Compose stack deploy/rollback with revisions and audit trail. Multi-vendor GPU auto-detection (NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Apple Metal).

feature.chat.title.description: Title for the Chat Console feature card

feature.chat.description.message: Built-in chat UI with SSE streaming, drag-and-drop session management, error retry, dark / light theming, and per-model usage tracking. Supports all gateway-connected models.

hero.gtcBadge.message: GTC 2026 — Inference Infrastructure for the Enterprise

hero.languages.message: Available in English, Deutsch, Español, 中文

arch.gateway.desc.message: OpenAI-compatible /v1/* endpoint. Routes to vLLM, llama.cpp, Ollama, TGI and remote providers (OpenAI, Azure, …). SSE streaming, alias-based model resolution, retry, and rate limiting.

arch.pii.desc.message: Microsoft Presidio integration for real-time detection and redaction. Per-tenant policies with configurable entity types and fail-safe modes.

arch.gpu.desc.message: Auto-detects NVIDIA (CUDA), AMD (ROCm), and Intel GPUs. Spawns vLLM containers with the correct image (CUDA / ROCm / Legacy). HuggingFace cache mounting for fast model loading.

arch.storage.desc.message: PostgreSQL with pgvector for vector search (RAG). Redis for rate limiting, session cache, and distributed leasing. MinIO for S3-compatible document storage.

arch.observability.desc.message: Langfuse for LLM tracing with privacy modes. Grafana + Loki + Alloy for centralized logging. OpenTelemetry + Jaeger for distributed tracing. Prometheus metrics.

arch.controlplane.desc.message: FastAPI backend for RBAC, settings, Docker orchestration, module lifecycle, agent infra, and Compose stack management with revision tracking.

gtc.body.message: Teams deploying the models and accelerator architectures showcased at GTC 2026 need more than a runtime — they need a secure gateway. llm.port provides the missing production layer: an OpenAI-compatible API gateway with built-in PII redaction, RBAC, and full observability — all running inside your private VPC. No data leaves your perimeter.

gtc.feature.gateway.message: Secure API gateway with rate limiting, retry, and alias-based model routing

gtc.feature.pii.message: PII redaction before ingress and egress — Microsoft Presidio-powered

gtc.feature.gpu.message: Multi-vendor GPU auto-detection (NVIDIA CUDA, AMD ROCm, Intel) with automatic vLLM image selection

gtc.feature.observability.message: Enterprise observability: Langfuse LLM tracing, Grafana dashboards, and OpenTelemetry

gtc.feature.sovereign.message: Air-gapped, sovereign deployment — no external cloud dependency

roadmap.docling.desc.message: IBM Docling for rich document extraction — tables, images, pages. Service scaffold exists; integration with RAG pipeline in progress.

roadmap.auth.desc.message: Dedicated auth service for external identity provider management. Framework and compose profile defined.

roadmap.mailer.desc.message: Dedicated email delivery service for password resets, admin alerts, and system invites.

roadmap.ee.desc.message: License framework ready (Ed25519 JWT). Pro implementations for PII, RAG, and Gateway coming soon.

roadmap.runtimes.desc.message: TensorRT-LLM, SGLang, and additional managed API providers.

roadmap.costs.desc.message: Usage analytics per tenant, model, and user with budget limits and chargeback support.

hero.description.message: Routes, secures, and observes traffic across local LLM runtimes and remote providers — giving teams a single place to manage LLM services end-to-end.

section.why.text.message: keep data on-prem when needed, use remote providers when allowed, without changing your apps or losing governance and observability. One platform replaces a patchwork of proxies, dashboards, and scripts.

section.enterprise.text.message: for teams that need SSO, advanced PII tokenization, and governance.
